_status: Seed overrides for Milestone 1. Milestone 2 (stat engine) expands and validates this list against each item's wiki Effects section; every entry must cite its source page. Items whose descriptions say only 'Damage up' etc. are listed in data/report.md under 'Ambiguous stat descriptions' and belong here.

the-sad-onion.note: Also auto-extracted; kept as a known-good sanity pair for the extractor.

magic-mushroom.note: INCOMPLETE — 'All stats up' also grants speed/range; exact values to be confirmed from the wiki Effects section in Milestone 2.

polyphemus.note: INCOMPLETE — also a large tears-down; exact tear-delay change to be confirmed in Milestone 2.

brittle-bones.note: INCOMPLETE — converts all hearts to bone hearts; grants a permanent tears bonus each time a bone heart breaks. Conditional, so no flat modifier; exact per-break value to be confirmed in Milestone 2.

technology-2.note: INCOMPLETE — replaces tears with a continuous laser at reduced damage; exact damage multiplier to be confirmed in Milestone 2.

soy-milk.note: Fire delay is set near-minimum; modeled as a behavior in the engine, not a flat stat.
